headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://maps.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://maps.gstatic.com https://maps.googleapis.com https://i.pravatar.cc; connect-src 'self' ws: wss: http: https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none';
